## Summary

A concise description of the change and the problem it solves.

## Changes

- What changed and why (one or two bullets).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run the app locally and verified the change
- [ ] I added/updated relevant tests
- [ ] I updated documentation where necessary
- [ ] Migration/environment changes (if any) are documented

## How to verify

1. Steps to reproduce the behavior before the change
2. Steps to verify the fix

## Reviewers

Please assign reviewers (replace with usernames or team):

- @your-org/team-name

--
If this is a Dependabot/automation PR, set the title to include the package being updated and leave a short note about why the update is safe to merge.
